name: Sudarshan Chemical Industries Limited
summary: Sudarshan Chemical Industries Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells organic and inorganic pigments, and effect pigments in India and internationally. The company offers its pigment products under the Sudaperm, Sudafast, Sudacolor, Sudadur, Sudafine, Sudatex, Sumica, Sumica NXR, Sumicos, and Prestige brands that are used in paints, plastics, inks, cosmetics, textile, and other applications. It also manufactures pollution control equipment, size reduction equipment, and grinding equipment for industrial applications. Sudarshan Chemical Industries Limited was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
